description.text: Groups of Heroes battling through this slowly crumbling fortress could end up accelerating its destruction. A One Cube and a Base.

es.original: Groups of Heroes battling through this slowly crumbling fortress could end up accelerating its destruction. A One Cube and a Base.
es.translation:
Una fortaleza que se cae a pedazos con cada nueva escaramuza.
Un generador y un núcleo.

fr.original: Groups of Heroes battling through this slowly crumbling fortress could end up accelerating its destruction. A One Cube and a Base.
fr.translation: L'affrontement entre les deux équipes ennemies dans cette forteresse décrépite pourrait bien accélérer son effondrement. Un cube et une base.

de.original: Groups of Heroes battling through this slowly crumbling fortress could end up accelerating its destruction. A One Cube and a Base.
de.translation: Die vielen Helden, die sich durch diese Festung kämpfen, könnten ihren Einsturz noch beschleunigen. Ein Generator und eine Basis.

ru.original: Groups of Heroes battling through this slowly crumbling fortress could end up accelerating its destruction. A One Cube and a Base.
ru.translation: Группы героев, сражающиеся в этой медленно разваливающейся крепости, вполне могут ускорить ее разрушение. Один куб и база.

pt.original: Groups of Heroes battling through this slowly crumbling fortress could end up accelerating its destruction. A One Cube and a Base.
pt.translation: Grupos de heróis que batalham nesta fortaleza em desmoronamento podem acabar acelerando sua destruição. Um Cubo e uma Base.
